MODULE 1.3.6.1.2.1.31
2 objects 1 counters
▸ The MIB module to describe generic objects for network interface sub-layers.

column

ifInOctets

Counter32 read-only current octets
Description
The total number of octets received on the interface, including framing characters.
Properties
name ifInOctets oid 1.3.6.1.2.1.2.2.1.10 kindcolumn syntaxCounter32 accessread-only statuscurrent unitsoctets

Simulate trap

This generates a real snmptrap command. Verify the host before running it on a production network.

Composed suffix:

Row identity has validation errors — fix the highlighted inputs above before running this command. The suffix has been replaced with <ERROR>.

Multi-column composite indexes are decoded in a follow-on tier. Until then, type the dotted suffix yourself (e.g. .6.0.17.34.51.68.85 as a length-prefixed MAC address).

Credentials live in this browser tab only. Don't share screenshots of generated commands containing passwords.
blittermib · runs entirely on your server Made with AI and ❤️ for Open Source in Europe · About Me · Imprint · Privacy
Decode an SNMP walk
Drop a .txt capture here, or paste above.
 
The walk is parsed in memory and never written to disk, logged, or stored. Captures are capped at 10 MB (roughly 70–100k OIDs); for larger walks, filter or split before upload.
